value_signal: The hackathon page states that cash prizes will be awarded to top-performing individuals or teams; specific amounts are announced at the start.
eligibility_or_region_notes: Participants must be at least 13 years old and can participate individually or with a team of up to 4; the public page shows a current live deadline.
best_fit_track: General youth AI app or web-based build
evidence_gate: Submission receipt plus later award/payment or usable prize proof.
ai_can_do_next: Draft a short, public-safe concept brief and submission checklist using only public AI Monkey facts.
human_must_do_next: Human account owner must register on Devpost and submit if eligible.
automation_boundary: No login, account creation, Devpost submission, passwords, OTP, private keys, KYC, tax, bank, wallet, or private data handling.
why_this_is_not_income_yet: The route is open, but no submission, acceptance, winner notice, or payout has been verified.
suggested_next_check: If eligible, turn the existing AI Monkey public value network into the shortest possible demo and submission packet.

income_gate.rule: Counts only after verified submission, prize delivery, or usable award delivery.
